ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the clothing type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the clothing type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type the size chart belongs to */,
  "regular_size" TEXT /* Regular size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "integer_value" INTEGER /* Integer value corresponding to the regular size */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation or code for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the size conversion belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the size conversion belongs to */,
  "size_conversion" TEXT /* Size conversion value (e.g., 4-6, 6-8, 34, 34-36) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_history" (
  "size_conversion_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion history entry */,
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion the history entry belongs to */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date the size conversion was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_size_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_preferences" (
  "size_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the size preference belongs to */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type the size preference belongs to */,
  "regular_size" TEXT /* Regular size preferred by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key value */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_size_constraints" (
  "region_size_constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region size constraint */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the size constraint belongs to */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "min_size" INTEGER /* Minimum allowed size for the region */,
  "max_size" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed size for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size constraint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size constraint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_size_constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_constraints_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_analytics" (
  "size_conversion_analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion analytics entry */,
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion the analytics entry belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the analytics entry belongs to */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type the analytics entry belongs to */,
  "size_conversion_value" TEXT /* Size conversion value */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of times the size conversion was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_analytics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_analytics_size_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_analytics_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
